data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding agent-specific rate limits.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of agent-specific rate limits, but the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or results related to this functionality. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the behavior of agent-specific rate limits, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence or tests demonstrating how these rate limits are applied or validated, the requirement cannot be assessed.
gaps: No evidence of agent-specific rate limits functionality.
